calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Petitioner Petitioner Bo Qun Xian mother of minors present in court. Father of minor deceased.
Petitioner Sworn and examined.
Cantonese Interpreter: Sihong Ruan
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Jack Wei Jun Lao (Male DOB: 12-06-2001), and Amy Jing Lao (Female DOB: 11-22-1994).

Decrees Changing Name were submitted to and signed by the Court.
